'''ratugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoazurin|pseudoazurin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoazurin|pseudoazurin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ratugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rætigith|rætigith]] || [[word:rætigij|rætigij]] || [[word:rætigish|rætigish]] || [[word:rætigi|rætigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratutuguth|ratutuguth]] || [[word:ratutuguj|ratutuguj]] || [[word:ratutugush|ratutugush]] || [[word:ratutugu|ratutugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratuguth|ratuguth]] || [[word:ratuguj|ratuguj]] || [[word:ratugush|ratugush]] || [[word:ratugu|ratugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratufguth|ratufguth]] || [[word:ratufguj|ratufguj]] || [[word:ratufgush|ratufgush]] || [[word:ratufguf|ratufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ratuguthu|ratuguthu]] || [[word:ratuguju|ratuguju]] || [[word:ratugushu|ratugushu]] || [[word:ratuguku|ratuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ratuguth|ratuguth]] || [[word:ratuguj|ratuguj]] || [[word:ratugush|ratugush]] || [[word:ratugu|ratugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ratuguthul|ratuguthul]] || [[word:ratugujul|ratugujul]] || [[word:ratugushul|ratugushul]] || [[word:ratugukul|ratugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ratuguthuthu|ratuguthuthu]] || [[word:ratugujuju|ratugujuju]] || [[word:ratugushushu|ratugushushu]] || [[word:ratuguku|ratuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ratuguthun|ratuguthun]] || [[word:ratugujun|ratugujun]] || [[word:ratugushun|ratugushun]] || [[word:ratugukun|ratugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ratuguthuoro|ratuguthuoro]] || [[word:ratugujuoro|ratugujuoro]] || [[word:ratugushuoro|ratugushuoro]] || [[word:ratugukuoro|ratugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
